values.Label: Admin
values.Comment: Has full access to all system features and settings.

values.Label: Content Editor
values.Comment: Can create, edit, and delete content but cannot change system settings.

values.Label: Read-Only
values.Comment: Can view content but cannot make any changes.

values.Label: Forum Moderator
values.Comment: Can manage user comments and moderate discussions.

values.Label: Content Contributor
values.Comment: Can submit new content for review but cannot publish directly.

values.Label: Project Manager
values.Comment: Oversees project progress and manages team assignments.

values.Label: Customer Support
values.Comment: Handles user inquiries and provides technical assistance.

values.Label: Data Analyst
values.Comment: Has access to analytics and reporting tools.

values.Label: Software Developer
values.Comment: Can access and modify application code and integrations.

values.Label: Quality Assurance
values.Comment: Responsible for testing new features and reporting bugs.

values.Label: Human Resources
values.Comment: Manages employee records and recruitment processes.

values.Label: Finance Officer
values.Comment: Handles billing, invoices, and financial reports.

values.Label: Temporary Access
values.Comment: Limited access for temporary users or external collaborators.

values.Label: Training Specialist
values.Comment: Creates and delivers training materials to users.

values.Label: System Owner
values.Comment: Ultimate authority over the system, can assign or revoke any role.

values.Title: Annual Performance Review
values.Description: Structured workflow for conducting annual employee performance evaluations.

values.Title: Change Management Workflow
values.Description: Structured process for requesting, evaluating, and implementing organizational changes.

values.Title: Incident Reporting Process
values.Description: Steps for reporting, investigating, and resolving workplace incidents.

values.Title: Customer Feedback Collection
values.Description: Workflow for collecting, analyzing, and acting on customer feedback.

values.Title: Project Kickoff Process
values.Description: Steps to initiate a new project, including team assignment and goal setting.

values.Title: Employee Onboarding
values.Description: A step-by-step process to onboard new employees, including document collection, orientation, and training.

values.Title: Content Publishing Process
values.Description: Workflow for drafting, reviewing, and publishing content to the company website.

values.Title: Expense Reimbursement Process
values.Description: Steps for employees to submit expenses and receive reimbursements after approval.

values.Title: Procurement Workflow
values.Description: Process for requesting, approving, and purchasing goods or services.

values.Title: Invoice Approval Workflow
values.Description: Automated workflow for reviewing, approving, and processing vendor invoices.

values.Title: Asset Management Process
values.Description: Process for tracking, maintaining, and auditing company assets.

values.Title: Contract Review Workflow
values.Description: Workflow for legal and management review of contracts before signing.

values.Title: Recruitment Workflow
values.Description: Workflow for posting jobs, screening candidates, and scheduling interviews.

values.Title: IT Support Ticketing
values.Description: Workflow for submitting, triaging, and resolving IT support tickets.

values.Title: Leave Request Workflow
values.Description: Process for employees to submit, review, and approve leave requests.
